abilities.description: Up to one target legendary creature gains vigilance, lifelink, and indestructible until your next turn.
abilities.target_prompt: Select up to one target legendary creature.

abilities.description: Reveal the top four cards of your library. Put any number of legendary cards from among them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Create a Treasure token for each card put into your graveyard this way.
Gain control of all nonland permanents until end of. Untap them. They gain haste until end of turn.
